signals.headline: XRP Reclaims #3 Market Cap Spot on Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Reclaims #3 Market Cap Spot on Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP overtook BNB as the third-largest cryptocurrency, driven by record $65.89 million in spot ETF inflows for April 2026. Ripple simultaneously announced a four-phase quantum-resistant roadmap for the XRP Ledger by 2028.[4]

signals.headline: SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable Scheduled for April 16 | PARTIAL | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable Scheduled for April 16 | PARTIAL | MEDIUM confidence**
While the roundtable occurred on April 16 to discuss digital asset regulatory oversight, Senate Banking Chairman Tim Scott indicated the broader CLARITY Act markup may not occur until May, citing unresolved disputes over stablecoins and DeFi provisions. Polymarket odds for 2026 passage dropped to 54%.[5][7]
